s2.ptxt: Align the matchmarks and install the front disc.

atten3.ptxt: When replacing the disc with a new one, select the installation position where the front disc has the minimum runout.

s-1.ptxt: TEMPORARILY TIGHTEN FRONT DISC BRAKE BLEEDER PLUG

s2.ptxt: Temporarily tighten the front disc brake bleeder plug to the disc brake cylinder sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DISC BRAKE BLEEDER PLUG CAP

s2.ptxt: Install the bleeder plug cap to the front disc brake bleeder plug.
Apply lithium soap base glycol grease to a new piston seal.
Install the piston seal to the disc brake cylinder assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DISC BRAKE PISTON (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Apply lithium soap base glycol grease to the piston and a new cylinder boot.
Install the cylinder boot to the piston.
Install the piston to the disc brake cylinder assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Do not install the piston forcibly in the cylinder assembly.

s2.ptxt: Install the cylinder boot to the disc brake cylinder assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Install the boot securely to the grooves of the cylinder and piston.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, install a new set ring.

item.ptxt: Install the set ring securely to the grooves of the cylinder boot.
Do not damage the cylinder boot.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Apply lithium soap base glycol grease to the piston and a new cylinder boot.
Install the cylinder boot to the piston as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DISC BRAKE PISTON (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the cylinder boot to the cylinder assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Install the boot securely to the grooves of the cylinder.

s2.ptxt: Push in the piston by hand and install the boot seal onto the grooves of the piston.

atten3.ptxt: Install the boot securely to the grooves of the piston.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DISC BRAKE BUSHING DUST BOOT

s2.ptxt: Apply lithium soap base glycol grease to the seal surface of 2 new bushing dust boots.
Install the 2 bushing dust boots to the front disc brake cylinder mounting.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DISC BRAKE CYLINDER SLIDE BUSHING

s2.ptxt: Apply lithium soap base glycol grease to a new front disc brake cylinder slide bushing.
Install the front disc brake cylinder slide bushing to the No. 2 front disc brake cylinder slide pin.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 FRONT DISC BRAKE CYLINDER SLIDE PIN

s2.ptxt: Apply lithium soap base glycol grease to the sliding part and the seal surface of the No. 2 front disc brake cylinder slide pin.
Install the No. 2 front disc brake cylinder slide pin to the bottom side of the cylinder mounting.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 FRONT DISC BRAKE CYLINDER SLIDE PIN

s2.ptxt: Apply lithium soap base glycol grease to the sliding part and the seal surface of the No. 1 front disc brake cylinder slide pin.
Install the No. 1 front disc brake cylinder slide pin.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DISC BRAKE CYLINDER MOUNTING

s2.ptxt: Install the cylinder mounting with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DISC BRAKE PAD SUPPORT PLATE

s2.ptxt: Apply disc brake grease to the anti-squeal shims.

item.ptxt: When replacing worn pads, the anti-squeal shims must be replaced together with the pads.
Install the shims in the correct positions and directions.
Apply disc brake grease to the area that contacts the anti-squeal shim.
Disc brake grease can come out slightly from the area where the anti-squeal shim is installed.
Make sure that disc brake grease is not applied onto the lining surface.

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 anti-squeal shims and the 2 pad wear indicators to each pad.

atten3.ptxt: Install the pad wear indicators in the correct positions and directions.

s2.ptxt: Install the 2 brake pads with anti-squeal shims to the disc brake cylinder mounting.
Install the 2 anti-squeal springs.

atten3.ptxt: When replacing the front brake pads with new ones, make sure to replace the anti-squeal spring at the same time.
